pages.text: Fireball: Lianqi Early, fire, costs 10 qi.$(br)Gather spiritual qi within your palm and shape it into a blazing fireball, hurling it forth to burn foes and scorch all in its path.

$(br)Lingbeng: Lianqi Late, thunder, costs 85 qi.$(br)Circulate spiritual power to enter the Lingbeng state. Activating it again prolongs its effects and expands the explosive flames. This technique may be stacked up to ten layers.

$(br)Lightning Invocation: Lianqi Late, thunder, costs 40 qi.$(br)Commune with the spiritual energies of heaven and earth, launch a lightning talisman, and call down heavenly lightning to strike the target.

$(br)Five Thunder Orthodoxy: Foundation Establishment Middle, thunder, costs 120 qi.$(br)An orthodox Daoist lightning art. Palm lightning and heavenly thunder descend together as five mighty lightning pillars, specializing in the destruction of evil spirits and demonic beings.
$(br)Regeneration: Lianqi Middle, wood, costs 20 qi.$(br)Guide spiritual qi to nourish the body. For three breaths, vitality continuously flows through the flesh, steadily healing wounds.
$(br)Beam: Lianqi Early, light, costs 30 qi.$(br)Condense spiritual power into a unique streak of light visible only to the caster. The phenomenon lingers for ten breaths before fading.

$(br)Earth Escape: Lianqi Late, earth.$(br)Sink into the earth and travel through soil and stone while greatly increasing movement speed. Consumes 8 qi each second underground and ends upon returning to the surface.
$(br)Cleanse: Lianqi Early, water, costs 10 qi.$(br)Recite a cleansing incantation to wash over the body, removing all lingering curses, afflictions, and negative effects.

$(br)Sliding Water: Lianqi Early, water, costs 30 qi.$(br)Launch a condensed water orb that forms a shallow pool upon impact. Those who step into it find their movements distorted and their controls reversed.

$(br)Qi Gathering: Lianqi Early, wind, costs no qi.$(br)Focus solely on absorbing the qi of heaven and earth. While active, you possess no offensive or defensive abilities, and all damage received is tripled.

$(br)Lingzhi Bullet: Lianqi Early, wind, costs 5 qi.$(br)Condense a thread of spiritual power at your fingertip and release it with a light flick. The qi cost is minimal, yet it can wound enemies and shatter up to three blocks of stone.
$(br)Wind Blade: Lianqi Early, wind, costs 5 qi.$(br)Gather fierce winds into a razor-sharp blade. Whether slashing, cutting, or piercing, its edge can grievously wound an enemy.

$(br)Wind Step: Lianqi Early, wind, costs 5 qi per second.$(br)A movement technique that may be toggled at will. Winds gather beneath your feet, greatly increasing speed and granting an additional midair jump. Consumes 5 qi per second.

$(br)Wind Riding Art: Lianqi Late, wind, costs 30 qi per second.$(br)Ride the winds and drift through the air at low altitude. Consumes 30 qi per second. If no solid ground exists within twenty meters below, the power of flight is lost.
$(br)Smoke Art: Lianqi Early, wind, costs 15 qi.$(br)Condense mist into a projectile and launch it forward. Those caught within the spreading smoke are blinded and unable to see for ten breaths.
$(br)Ignite Flare: Lianqi Early, fire, costs 10 qi.$(br)Channel true fire into a blazing streak that races forward. Grass, wood, stone, and all it touches are set aflame.
$(br)Spirit Sight: Lianqi Early, light, costs 5 qi per second.$(br)A spiritual eye technique that may be freely toggled. When active, night appears as bright as day. Consumes 5 qi per second.

$(br)Zhenshan Palm: Foundation Establishment Middle, earth, tier Earth, costs 390 qi.$(br)Gather the power of earth and stone into a colossal palm strike. The palm persists for three breaths, crushing all rock and soil in its path.

$(br)Light Ball: Foundation Establishment Late, light, costs 90 qi to summon and 30 qi per shot.$(br)Expend 90 qi to summon six hexagonal spirit orbs behind you, stacking up to three layers. A punch fires a single orb, while a concealed strike releases them all at once. Each orb possesses immense destructive power, capable of devastating powerful foes and shattering large areas of terrain.

$(br)Dielang Shield: Lianqi Late, water, tier Earth.$(br)Condense layers of water-aspected spiritual power into protective shields. One layer costs 50 qi and blocks 12 damage; two layers cost 100 qi and block 36 damage; three layers cost 150 qi and withstand 108 damage.

$(br)Weiya: innate for non-mortals, toggle spell.$(br)A pressure aura technique that may be activated at will. Vast cultivation pressure radiates from your body, consuming 10% of your total qi each second while suppressing creatures whose cultivation is below your own.

$(br)Absorb: granted by Reincarnation True Art, dark, costs 80 qi.$(br)Launch a dark-aspected spirit projectile. If it strikes someone with lower cultivation, one-tenth of their cultivation progress is extracted and added to your own.

$(br)Devour Heaven: granted by Heaven Devouring Demon Art, dark.$(br)Devour all earth and stone within a five-meter radius, leaving nothing behind. Each block consumed advances your cultivation. The technique also devastates nearby living beings, and slain foes have their essence absorbed to greatly increase your cultivation.

$(br)Wind Pressure: granted by Void Breaking Art, wind.$(br)A toggleable secret technique. After channeling power, every punch—whether through the air, against stone, or at an enemy—unleashes a spiraling cone of compressed wind. Upon reaching the Jindan Realm, concealed punches can summon a far larger wind cone.

$(br)Binding Spell: Foundation Establishment Late, metal, costs 200 qi.$(br)Silently recite an arcane incantation and launch a metal-aspected spirit projectile. Targets with lower cultivation become rigid and unable to move for a short time.
